seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani Summit Trek 2 Days — Sembalun Route | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Conquer the Mount Rinjani summit at 3,726 m in 2 days via the Sembalun Route. Certified guides, full camp support, and crater rim views over Segara Anak lake. Book with Go2Rinjani.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani Summit | 2-Day Sembalun Trek
hero.desc: The fastest route to the top of Lombok — Go2Rinjani's 2-day Sembalun summit trek takes you from the open savannahs of Sembalun valley to the summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m, Indonesia's second-highest volcano, with panoramic views over Segara Anak lake and across to Mount Agung in Bali.

intro.label: 2 Days 1 Night — Sembalun Route
intro.title: The Most Direct Path to the Rinjani Summit
intro.desc: The Sembalun Route is the preferred choice for trekkers targeting the Mount Rinjani summit. Starting from Sembalun valley at 1,156 m, the trail climbs through open savannah landscapes and traditional Sasak farmland before reaching Plawangan Sembalun — the crater rim at 2,639 m — and pushing to the summit at 3,726 m. Go2Rinjani's certified local guides lead every step of the ascent, ensuring a safe, well-paced, and rewarding climb.

highlights.section_title: What to Expect on This Trek

items.title: Sembalun Savannah Trail
items.desc: The trek begins in the open savannah landscapes of Sembalun valley — wide, dramatic terrain shaped by traditional Sasak farmland on the eastern slopes of Mount Rinjani National Park.

items.title: Plawangan Sembalun Crater Rim
items.desc: Reach Plawangan Sembalun at 2,639 m — the crater rim campsite with sweeping views over Segara Anak lake, the sacred turquoise crater lake of Mount Rinjani, and Lombok's coastline beyond.

items.title: Mount Rinjani Summit at 3,726 m
items.desc: The final push to the summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m — Lombok's highest point and Indonesia's second-highest volcano. On clear mornings, the summit reveals views across Bali, Sumbawa, and the entire Lombok Strait.

items.title: Sunrise Above the Clouds
items.desc: Go2Rinjani times the summit push for pre-dawn departure from Plawangan Sembalun — arriving at the top of Mount Rinjani for one of the most spectacular sunrises in Indonesia.

itinerary.intro: A fast, focused Mount Rinjani summit trek — two days, one night at the crater rim, and a sunrise above the clouds.

days.title: Sembalun Trailhead to Plawangan Sembalun Crater Rim
days.desc: After breakfast and briefing at your pre-trek accommodation in Sembalun, Go2Rinjani transfers you to the Sembalun trailhead (1,156 m). Trek through open savannah landscapes and three rest posts before arriving at Plawangan Sembalun crater rim (2,639 m) by late afternoon. Dinner and overnight camping at the crater rim with views over Segara Anak lake.
highlights: Arrive Plawangan Sembalun crater rim (2,639 m)
Sunset over Segara Anak lake from crater rim
Dinner & overnight camp at Plawangan Sembalun

days.title: Summit Push — Descent to Sembalun
days.desc: Pre-dawn departure from Plawangan Sembalun for the summit push to 3,726 m — arriving at the top of Mount Rinjani for sunrise above the clouds. After summit photos and rest, descend back to Plawangan Sembalun for breakfast, then continue the full descent to the Sembalun trailhead. Transfer back to accommodation.
highlights: Pre-dawn summit push from Plawangan Sembalun (2,639 m)
Arrive Mount Rinjani summit (3,726 m) at sunrise
Panoramic views over Lombok, Bali & Sumbawa
Descend to Plawangan Sembalun — breakfast at camp

inclusions.intro: Every Mount Rinjani summit trek with Go2Rinjani is fully supported — here is exactly what is included.
included: Porter (personal camp equipment up to 25 kg)
Mount Rinjani National Park entrance permit
All meals on the mountain (3x daily) + hot drinks + mineral water
Full camping equipment: tent, sleeping bag, mattress, pillow, cooking gear
Hotel pickup and drop-off (Sembalun, Senaru, Mataram, Airport, Senggigi)
excluded: Personal trekking gear (jacket, trekking shoes, trekking poles, daypack)
Tips for guides and porters (appreciated but not mandatory)

trek_details.intro: Everything you need to know before booking your 2-day Mount Rinjani summit trek via Sembalun.

details.label: Route
details.value: Sembalun Route — start and finish at Sembalun trailhead

details.label: Summit Elevation
details.value: 3,726 m above sea level — Lombok's highest peak

details.label: Best Season
details.value: April – December (dry season). Closed January – March.

details.label: Permit
details.value: Mount Rinjani National Park permit — included in package

details.label: Group Size
details.value: Minimum 2 — maximum 6 per group. Private groups available.

details.label: Torean Route Option
details.value: Not available on 2-day itinerary — available on 3-day and 4-day packages

Trekkers who want the full experience — summit, lake & hot spring
Trekkers who want to take their time and fully immerse in Rinjani

cta.title: Book Your 2-Day Sembalun Summit Trek with Go2Rinjani
cta.desc: Go2Rinjani handles everything — permits, guides, porters, meals, and transfers. All you need to bring is your determination and a sense of adventure. The summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m is waiting.
